Package vaultWeb.repositories

Interface ChatMessageRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<ChatMessage,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<ChatMessage,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<ChatMessage,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<ChatMessage,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<ChatMessage,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<ChatMessage>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<ChatMessage,Long>
@Repository public interface ChatMessageRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<ChatMessage,Long>
